projects.label: Path Finding Sim
projects.description: Interactive canvas visualizer for classic pathfinding algorithms—watch search frontiers unfold and compare heuristics in real time.

projects.label: ProbSim
projects.description: Hands-on probability playground in the browser: experiments, distributions, and intuition for coursework and demos.

projects.label: Brave Heart
projects.description: Landing and product UX for a fire-safety-focused site—responsive React shell backed by ASP APIs.

projects.label: RUBIKZ
projects.description: In-browser Rubik's cube sandbox: scramble, manipulate layers, and learn patterns without installing an app.

projects.label: Connect-4
projects.description: Play against a minimax-backed opponent—full board logic, pruning, and instant replays from the deployed build.

projects.label: Chain-Reaction
projects.description: Chain-reaction puzzle in the vein of Virus Wars; AI opponent built on the same minimax stack.

projects.label: Snake Game
projects.description: Retro snake implemented in C++—terminal or framework-friendly codebase for messing with game loops and collision.

projects.label: Upload
projects.description: Team file-management pipeline: Django services plus a Vue SPA for uploads, roles, and handoff-friendly workflows.

projects.label: Budget-Co
projects.description: Shared budgeting web app deployed on Railway—track pools, receipts, and split expenses with Django under the hood.

projects.label: Laymans-Law
projects.description: Legal literacy concept for non-lawyers—Next.js experience paired with Django content and auth prototypes.

projects.label: 9 Mazes of Hell
projects.description: Collaborative dungeon-maze outing in JavaScript—team-built levels, pacing, and browser-native controls.
